name: Los Venganza Del Almo Chili
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Wesson oil or kidney suet
recipeInstructions:
also called mole poblano
1. In a large pot, combine Paprika, Oregano, MSG, chili powder, Cumin, Beef bouillon, beer, and 2 cups water.
2. Let simmer.
3. In a separate skillet, brown meat in batches of 1 pound or 1 1/2 pounds with Wesson oil or suet.
4. Drain the meat and add it to the simmering spices.
5. Continue cooking until all the meat is done.
6. Sauté chopped onion and garlic in 1 tablespoon oil or suet.
7. Add the onion mixture to the spices and meat.
8. Add water as needed.
9. Simmer for 2 hours.
10. Stir in Mole, Sugar, Coriander seed, hot sauce, and Tomato sauce.
11. Let simmer for 45 minutes.
12. Dissolve masa harina flour in warm water to form a paste.
13. Stir the paste into the chili.
14. Add salt to taste.
15. Simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
16. For extra heat, add more Louisiana hot sauce.
17. Makes 1 pot.
